summary: AI-focused Software Engineer with 2+ years of experience delivering production software across Python backends and React-heavy frontends, spanning consumer marketplaces, enterprise platforms, and financial systems.
Strong backend focus on API design, data modeling, and real-time workflows, using PostgreSQL, DynamoDB, and AWS to support high-traffic, latency-sensitive applications.
Hands-on experience applying GenAI in production, including LLM-based classification, RAG pipelines, and AI-assisted decision flows, integrated into real business processes.
Proven ability to ship reliable systems through CI/CD automation, cloud deployment, and monitoring, improving release speed, system stability, and developer feedback loops.

experience.title: Software Developer
bullets: Developed the customer-facing web app from scratch using React + Material UI with a Node.js (Express) backend, supporting end-to-end kitchen discovery and booking flows used by live food sellers.
Designed backend APIs in Python with DynamoDB, handling kitchen availability, pricing rules, and booking state while keeping response times under 300 ms for core flows.
Set up automated build and deployment using GitHub Actions + AWS, cutting manual release effort and reducing average deployment time from 30 minutes to under 10 minutes.
Implemented an AI-based kitchen matching flow using Python + LLM APIs, ranking kitchens by location, availability, and seller requirements, which reduced manual kitchen shortlisting by 40%.
Architected an early RAG prototype using Python, embeddings, and vector search to answer seller queries about kitchen rules and onboarding steps, lowering support follow-ups during onboarding by 25%.

experience.title: Software Developer Intern
bullets: Designed Python-based backend services to ingest and normalize large-scale tax and financial documents, processing millions of records each filing season with validation rules aligned to compliance workflows.

Implemented LLM-driven classification and data extraction pipelines in Python, orchestrated through AWS Lambda and SQS, reducing manual review effort for tax operations teams by 32% during peak periods.

Developed an internal RAG service using Python, embeddings, and vector search on AWS-managed storage, enabling fast retrieval of tax policy guidance, cutting analyst lookup time from minutes to seconds.

Integrated AI services with core platform APIs using REST APIs deployed on AWS (API Gateway, ECS), enforcing IAM-based access controls, audit logging, and stable latency under seasonal traffic spikes.
Added production monitoring and safety fallbacks using CloudWatch metrics and Python-based confidence checks, lowering incorrect AI-assisted suggestions by 18% during high-volume filings.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Delivered modular enterprise applications using Python (Django), React with TypeScript, and PostgreSQL, supporting 100K+ monthly transactions while maintaining 99.95% uptime for client-facing workflows.
Reworked release and environment workflows through Git-based CI/CD and AWS, cutting average deployment time from 45 minutes to 7 minutes and reducing rollback incidents during peak releases.
Developed REST and GraphQL APIs using Django REST Framework and Node.js (Express) to replace manual business operations, saving an estimated 5,000+ client labor hours annually.
Implemented a real-time logistics and shipment tracking system using Python, Flask, WebSockets, and PostgreSQL, enabling live visibility across 15+ countries and lowering delivery delays by 42%.
Delivered executive reporting dashboards using React and Recharts backed by Django APIs, consolidating fragmented data sources and improving reporting accuracy from 68% to 99.6%.

education.degree: Master of Science in Information Systems
Bachelor of Engineering in Electronics Engineering
education.school: Mumbai University -- Ramrao Adik Institute of Technology

Cloud Platforms: AWS (Lambda, ECS, API Gateway, SQS, CloudWatch, IAM)
